title: PvZ Cubed
description: Plants vs. Zombies Cubed aims to bring various pieces of content and characters from the Plants vs. Zombies franchise to Minecraft.
body:
# PvZ Cubed


Add's many aspects of the PvZ franchise to Minecraft. From the games you all know like PvZ1 and PvZ 2. To more obscure entries like PvZ Adventures and PvZ2 Chinese Version.

Pea-Shooters, Cone heads, Potato mines, its all there. And with the power of the Botany Box they are all yours to make to defend yourself from the zombie horde.

So buckle up because things are about to get CRRRRRAAAAAAAAZZZZZZZZZYYYYYYYY!!!!!!!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uWYEgshvH3M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Content
You can use the Suburban Almanac Patchouli book to learn about this mod more in depth. You are going to get one automatically upon first time logging in a world.

If you lose your Suburban Almanac, you can craft another one anytime by combining a Dirt Block and a Wheat Seed together in any shape.

## Requirements

Quilt

QFAPI

GeckoLib

Patchouli

OwO lib



## Credits
MaddyisDev for originally creating the mod (available [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/pvzcubed))

Electronic Arts

PopCap

Plants vs. Zombies Wiki

Yoshicraft64 for some of the sounds

Code:

Kaupenjoe, for the tutorials
